products.description: Introducing the Lane Linen 100% Cotton Waffle Kitchen Dish Cloth, the perfect companion for your kitchen tasks. Crafted with care, these dish cloths are designed to offer exceptional functionality and convenience. Made from 100% cotton, our dish cloths are not only soft but also highly absorbent, making them ideal for drying dishes, wiping countertops, and cleaning spills. The waffle weave pattern enhances absorbency by creating more surface area for quick and efficient drying. Measuring 12x12 inches, these dish cloths are just the right size for all your kitchen needs. Whether you're tackling a large load of dishes or wiping down delicate glassware, these cloths have got you covered. The ultra-soft texture of the cotton fabric ensures a gentle touch on all your kitchen surfaces, preventing scratches and maintaining their pristine condition. You can confidently use them on delicate cookware, glass, and other sensitive materials without worrying about damage. One of the standout features of these dish cloths is their quick-drying ability. Thanks to the waffle weave construction, they promote faster air circulation, allowing them to dry rapidly after use. Available in a convenient 6 pack or 12 pack, these dish cloths offer great value for money. With multiple cloths at your disposal, you can have one for every task in the kitchen, ensuring a clean and hygienic environment. Cleaning these dish cloths is a breeze. Simply toss them in the washing machine and they'll come out looking fresh and ready for their next use. The high-quality cotton fabric ensures durability and long-lasting performance, so you can rely on these dish cloths to be your trusty kitchen companions for years to come. Experience the softness, absorbency, and convenience that these dish cloths bring to your daily kitchen routine. Order your pack today and discover the joy of effortless cleaning and drying.
features: Premium Tea Towels for Kitchen : Why waste your time scrubbing pots and pans when you can let our dish towel do the work for you? Our dish rags are made of 100% natural cotton, making them durable and firm enough to withstand repeated uses and washings without losing their shape or color.
Absorbent: The high-quality cotton fabric used in the manufacturing of our cotton dish towels makes them highly absorbent. They will quickly soak up any liquid or food mess, making clean-up a breeze.

Value Pack : Lane Linen dish towels and dishcloths sets includes 6 Pack Dish rags for washing dishes. With a convenient size of 12 x 12" anyone can handle these kitchen linen sets and you will never run out of dish towels again!

Multi-purpose Design: The design of our kitchen washcloths makes them multi-purpose. They can be used as dish towels, hand towels, or even napkins. The stripe design on our dish towels makes them look elegant and decent. Makes a great gift for the chef in your life!
Care Instruction - Machine washable. Tumble dry on low. It’s recommended to wash it separately on first use to minimize lint.

features: [Smiley Face Holder]: Our sink caddy comes with smiley face sponge holder. This delightful design not only adds a cheerful vibe to your countertop but also keeps your sponge neatly in place, combines practicality and personality

[2 Installation Methods]: 1. You can use the adhesive to fix, adhesive allows the sink caddy firmly on the hook without falling. 2. You can use the suction cups, please sprinkle a small amount of water before installation to ensure better suction

[Reasonable Capacity Sink Caddy]: The size of our sink brush holder is 6.49 *1.96 * 2.95 inches, reasonable capacity not only won't take up too much space, but also can well store the kitchen items for you. Please measure before you buy

[Save Space]: You can place items in this dish soap holder in an orderly manner, so as to save the occupation of the kitchen by the items and keep your kitchen clean and tidy. Hapirm multifunctional kitchen brush holder can also be placed in other rooms

[Durable Stainless Steel]: Constructed of 304 stainless steel with with a layer of anti rust coating, Hapirm sponge holder for kitchen sink can effectively prevent rust even in wet conditions and has a long service life
[Fast Drainage]: The hollow design can quickly drain the water from the sink sponge holder and items, allowing the air to circulate faster, maintaining the health and safety of you and your family

[Package and Notes]: You will get 1 × sink organizer caddy, 1 × adhesive hook (clean and dry the sink surface before using the adhesive), 2 × suction cups (sprinkle a small amount of water before using the suction cup)
[Support]: Our sponge caddy for kitchen sink can meet your daily needs well. If you are not satisfied with this kitchen sink sponge holder, please reach out to us

features: 【Titanium Alloy Cutting Board Set of Three】: Includes three cutting boards of different sizes: 16 inches long x 10 inches wide, 13 inches long x 8 inches wide, and 10.5 inches long x 6.5 inches wide. Choose the appropriate size cutting board based on the size of your ingredients, saving valuable kitchen space and keeping your cooking area organized. The double-sided design allows for easy separation of raw and cooked foods, ensuring optimal flavor.

【Durable and Sturdy】: This cutting board is made of one-piece molded titanium alloy, without the use of any glue or adhesive, making it non-toxic, harmless, and durable. The brushed surface treatment makes it smooth and non-porous, making it less prone to stains or odors.

【Health-Protecting Cutting Boards】: Compared to plastic, wooden, or bamboo cutting boards, our titanium cutting boards do not absorb food residue and will not warp due to moisture. Whether you use them as household cutting boards or in a busy restaurant kitchen, these cutting boards provide a safe and hygienic environment for chopping vegetables.

【Easy to Clean】: The smooth surface makes the cutting board very easy to clean; simply rinse with water to remove stains. They are also dishwasher safe; the thin design saves you dishwasher space. This convenience saves you time and effort, making post-meal cleanup a breeze.

【Unique and Exquisite Packaging】: This titanium cutting board comes in beautiful, colorful packaging, making it an ideal gift. Choosing a titanium cutting board as a gift is not only giving a beautiful kitchen item, but also giving the gift of health.
products.parentTitle: Titanium Cutting Boards,100% Pure Titanium Kitchen Cutting Board,
products.title: Titanium Cutting Board, 100% Pure Titanium Cutting Boards for Kitchen, Double-Sided Non-Toxic Cutting Board, Ideal for Slicing and Dicing Meats, Features Handle, Dishwasher Safe,13"L*8"W（silver）
